zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Beauchamp於大約1472年出生在英國武斯特斯爾時，她的父親Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp39歲，母親Elizabeth Stafford49歲。她於1490年與Richard Lygon在英國武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1534年7月22日在英國武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Beauchamp于大约1472年出生在英国武斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp39岁，母亲Elizabeth Stafford49岁。她于1490年与Richard Lygon在英国武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1534年7月22日在英国武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Beauchamp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Beecham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Beauchamp  , reflecting the normal English pronunciation.

variants.name: Beachem
meanings: English (Somerset and Gloucestershire): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Bagent
meanings: possibly a colloquial pronunciation of Beauchamp or Beecham . Old French Beau- often appears as Be(e)- in English surnames. The -ch- has been voiced and excrescent -t has been added.

perhaps an Anglicized form of a French or Flemish surname such as Beaujean and Bejean, from Old French bel Jehan ‘handsome John’ + excrescent -t. It could have been introduced to England in the 15th or 16th century by Flemish migrants.

variants.name: Beacham
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beauchamp  .

variants.name: Campbell
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Bushaw
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beauchamp   and   Bouchard  .

variants.name: Beacom
meanings: English (Somerset) and Irish (Fermanagh): of Norman origin, a variant of   Beauchamp  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Beauchamp was born about 1472, in Worcestershire, England, her father, Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth Stafford, was 49. She married Richard Lygon in 1490, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 July 1534, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Beauchamp est née environ 1472, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stafford, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Lygon en 1490, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 juillet 1534, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Beauchamp um 1472 in Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Stafford 49. Sie hat 1490 in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England Richard Lygon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. Juli 1534 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Beauchamp è nata il circa 1472 nel Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Stafford, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Richard Lygon nel 1490, nel Madresfield, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 luglio 1534, nel Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Beauchampが約1472年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchampは39歳，母Elizabeth Staffordは49歳であった。1490年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドでRichard Lygonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1534年7月22日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Beauchamp(이)가 대략 1472년 영국 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Stafford(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 Richard Lygon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1534년 7월 22일 영국 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Beauchamp nasceu aproximadamente 1472, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stafford, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Lygon em 1490, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de julho de 1534, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Beauchamp родилась около 1472 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stafford, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Lygon в 1490 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 июля 1534 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Beauchamp nació aproximadamente 1472, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Beauchamp 2nd Baron Beauchamp, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stafford, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Richard Lygon en 1490, en Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de julio de 1534, en Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
